nodes.title: Combat Core
nodes.description: Turn-based state machine: initialization, turn order, state transitions, combat end detection

nodes.title: Combat Actions
nodes.description: Each action type (Strike, Escapade, Ward, Counter, Rest, Heal, RangedStrike) execution and gating

nodes.title: Combat Damage
nodes.description: Damage calculation formula, elemental multipliers, crit system, variance, broken multiplier

nodes.title: Combat Defense
nodes.description: Real-time dodge, parry, counter windows with timing-based Kynde rewards

nodes.title: Combat Break
nodes.description: Break gauge depletion, stun state, recovery, broken damage multiplier

nodes.title: Combat Status Effects
nodes.description: Status effect application, stacking, expiry, removal, and per-type creation (Hunger, Age, Frost, etc.)

nodes.title: Combat Hazards
nodes.description: Piers-themed environmental hazards per turn (Exhaustion, Poverty, Labor, Hunger)

nodes.title: Kynde Resource
nodes.description: Kynde generation, consumption, and modifier pipeline (Hunger, Age, Scar, Poverty)

nodes.title: Characters
nodes.description: Character class stats, identity, events, stamina restoration, fairy form

nodes.title: Enemies and Boss AI
nodes.description: Enemy character setup, movesets, SimpleEnemyAI, AdaptiveEnemyAI, boss-specific AI logic

nodes.title: Game State
nodes.description: Victory/defeat handling, XP calculation, special outcomes (Orfeo, Green Chapel, death-of-old-age)

nodes.title: Map and Progression
nodes.description: World map navigation, location transitions, encounter spawning, story beat triggers

nodes.title: Narrative
nodes.description: Story beats, dialogue choices, boss dialogue phases, manuscript-themed display

nodes.title: Save System
nodes.description: Save/load via PlayerPrefs, checkpoints, progress tracking, accrual counters

nodes.title: Meta-Progression
nodes.description: Aging, poverty, multi-run scaling, hidden effects, Wode-Wo passcode

nodes.title: Input
nodes.description: Combat dodge/parry/counter: ICombatWindowInput facade, tests, future Input Actions and rebinding

nodes.title: Audio
nodes.description: MusicManager themes, crossfade, test hooks; future SFX director

nodes.title: UI Shell
nodes.description: Menus, HUD, combat UI smoke flows

nodes.title: Scenes and Bootstrap
nodes.description: Build order, Main scene, GameRuntime wiring

nodes.title: Performance
nodes.description: Frame budgets, GC-free hot paths, profiling

nodes.title: Accessibility and Localization
nodes.description: Timing windows, text scaling, future locale tables

nodes.title: Demo vertical slice (Tier A)
nodes.description: Shippable playable demo: canonical path tour → fayre_felde combat → hub; tests + manual smoke per DEMO_RUN.md. Depends on core game folders.

nodes.title: Steam / EA planning (Tier B)
nodes.description: Milestone planning track only—execute after Tier A Definition of Done (or parallel non-blocking assets). See .tdad/workflows/steam-early-access/ and plan-steam-milestones.md.

nodes.title: Godot full port + archive (gated)
nodes.description: M1–M6 migration milestones; Unity demo-vertical-slice is oracle until M6. See .tdad/workflows/godot-full-port/ and prompts plan-godot-port-milestone.md, godot-archive-unity-snapshot.md.

nodes.title: Godot parity slice
nodes.description: Mirrors demo-vertical-slice behaviors with Godot proofs. See .tdad/workflows/godot-parity-slice/ and .tdad/bdd/godot-parity-slice.feature. Retail save paths, autosave, and Steam ship checklist: godot-steam-build.

nodes.title: Godot demo components (granular proofs)
nodes.description: Per-subsystem TDAD nodes mapping to run_headless_tests.gd and BDD; see .tdad/workflows/godot-demo-components/ and docs/CI_GODOT_TESTS.md.

nodes.title: Godot Steam / retail build (TDAD)
nodes.description: Shipping layer: user:// retail cfg names, autosave mirror, legacy demo migration, headless regression, export/Steamworks. Workflow: .tdad/workflows/godot-steam-build/. Depends on godot-parity-slice. Index: .tdad/README.md. Player/QA doc: KyndeBlade_Godot/STEAM_BUILD.md.
